languages.text: "Мне приятен факт сотрудничества с давней знакомой, и я с нетерпением ожидаю встречи".

traits.locale_text: "Мне приятен факт сотрудничества с давней знакомой, и я с нетерпением ожидаю встречи".

languages.text: "It is a pleasure to collaborate with an old friend once more, and I look forward to our upcoming encounter with great anticipation."
languages.original_text: "Мне приятен факт сотрудничества с давней знакомой, и я с нетерпением ожидаю встречи".

traits.locale_text: "It is a pleasure to collaborate with an old friend once more, and I look forward to our upcoming encounter with great anticipation."
"It is a pleasure to collaborate with an old friend once more, and I look forward to our upcoming encounter with great anticipation."

languages.text: "Es ist mir ein Vergnügen, erneut mit einem alten Freund zusammenzuarbeiten, und ich sehe dem anstehenden Kampf mit großer Vorfreude entgegen."
languages.original_text: "It is a pleasure to collaborate with an old friend once more, and I look forward to our upcoming encounter with great anticipation."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist mir ein Vergnügen, erneut mit einem alten Freund zusammenzuarbeiten, und ich sehe dem anstehenden Kampf mit großer Vorfreude entgegen."

languages.text: « C'est un plaisir de collaborer à nouveau avec un vieil ami et j'attends notre prochaine rencontre avec la plus grande impatience. »
languages.original_text: "It is a pleasure to collaborate with an old friend once more, and I look forward to our upcoming encounter with great anticipation."

traits.locale_text: « C'est un plaisir de collaborer à nouveau avec un vieil ami et j'attends notre prochaine rencontre avec la plus grande impatience. »

languages.text: «Es un placer volver a colaborar con viejas amistades y espero nuestro encuentro con gran entusiasmo».
languages.original_text: "It is a pleasure to collaborate with an old friend once more, and I look forward to our upcoming encounter with great anticipation."

traits.locale_text: «Es un placer volver a colaborar con viejas amistades y espero nuestro encuentro con gran entusiasmo».

languages.text: "Eski bir dostla bir kez daha iş birliği yapmak büyük bir zevk. Yaklaşan karşılaşmamızı büyük bir sabırsızlıkla bekliyorum."
languages.original_text: "It is a pleasure to collaborate with an old friend once more, and I look forward to our upcoming encounter with great anticipation."

traits.locale_text: "Eski bir dostla bir kez daha iş birliği yapmak büyük bir zevk. Yaklaşan karşılaşmamızı büyük bir sabırsızlıkla bekliyorum."

languages.text: “很高兴能再次与老朋友合作，我十分期待我们接下来的会面。”
languages.original_text: "It is a pleasure to collaborate with an old friend once more, and I look forward to our upcoming encounter with great anticipation."

traits.locale_text: “很高兴能再次与老朋友合作，我十分期待我们接下来的会面。”
